title: Using ChatGPT for Writing and Recommending Books - Ep. 2 with Nat Eliason
title_zh: 使用ChatGPT撰写和推荐书籍-与Nat Eliason的第2集
full_text: How Nat Eliason uses ChatGPT to write books: Nat Eliason is a shape-shifter. He’s a writer with a book deal from Random House, a crypto trader, a Roam Research aficionado, a marketer, a book podcaster, a parent, and a seed oil iconoclast. He's amassed thousands of newsletter subscribers, 70,000 followers on X, and 110,000 on TikTok. His secret weapon for all of his exploring? ChatGPT. Nat took me through why he uses it every day for his work and his life. In this interview we talk about
